chunks.text: SM/PS ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P. No. D-5849 of 2021 ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- BEFORE: Justice Irfan Saadat Khan, Justice Muhammad Faisal Kamal Alam,JJ 1. For hearing of CMA No.24634/2021 (Urgent/App) 2. For hearing of CMA No.24635/2021 (Exemption/App) 3. For hearing of CMA No.24636/2021 (Stay/App) 4. For hearing of Main case --------- 29.09.2021 Mr. Ghulam Murtaza, advocate for the petitioner. Syed Mohsin Hussain Shah, Assistant Advocate General. -.----.---.- 1. Urgency application is granted. 2. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 3&4. Counsel for the petitioner states that a notice dated 08.09.2021 was issued to the petitioner, which on the face of it, does not pertain to the property acquired by the petitioner. The petitioner thereafter appeared before the Mukhtiarkar but as per petitioner no response was given by the Mukhtiarkar in this regard. Counsel for the petitioner states that he would be satisfied and would not press this petition if directions are issued to the Mukhtiarkar concerned to act in accordance with law. Syed Mohsin Hussain Shah, learned AAG present in Court waives notice and has no objection for disposal of the petition on the said prayer made in the instant petition. We therefore, direct the Mukhtairkar concerned to act strictly in accordance with law. With these directions the instant petition alongwith all the pending and listed applications stands disposed of.

We therefore, direct the Mukhtairkar concerned to act strictly in accordance with law. With these directions the instant petition alongwith all the pending and listed applications stands disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE
